name: Indie Hackers (community Discord)
post_rules: Community-run (not official IH). Channels split by stage — idea / validating / launched / growing / scaling. Post in the stage channel that matches you. Co-founder matching channel exists.
description: Community Discord for indie hackers — note: NOT operated by indiehackers.com, which has no official Discord. Invite stability unverified; re-check before citing.
